title: What reminds you of Evangelion in your day to day life
display_title: What reminds you of Evangelion in your day to day life
wikitext:
[]: What reminds you of Evangelion in your day to day life?             Quote Post by Barinax » Fri Jul 11, 2008 3:58 pm Pools. Especially, empty public indoor pools. The smell of chlorine, the colour of the walls and ceiling, the bottom of the pool, being underwater, ripples, and perhaps most of all, the fact the facilities are..... old. At least, the pool I go to, which belongs to a school.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri Jul 11, 2008 4:15 pm Anything that is phonetically similar to the terms in NGE. For example, in Wall-E, the EVE robot pronounced her name like "Eva." Or when I was listening to a missionary at my church, he was giving an example of some of their language, and one of the words was "evangeli," which was pretty darn close to "Evangelion." Finally, every time I watch Frasier and Frasier's ex-wife is mentioned (her name is Lilith), I instantly relate it to NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Jul 11, 2008 4:52 pm cicadas, those are the big one for me sometimes water droplets if they echo that phenomenon when it's really hot and humid and the air seems to move "in waves" girls who wear blue wigs red hair clips a room that's only partially lit, like Rei's

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Jul 11, 2008 6:34 pm Songs, mostly. Something in the lyrics will seem vaguely eva-like and suddenly I'll find myself imagining some character singing it, either as a monologue or to another character. Most recently I was chilling with Pandora and found myself wondering why nobody has done an AMV for a particular Savage Garden song featuring the R/S relationship. linkage

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Fri Jul 11, 2008 8:15 pm The Genesis song "Lilywhite Lilith" from The Lamb Lies Down on Broadway . Can't seem to think of anything else now.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Fri Jul 11, 2008 8:44 pm I can never look at soap bubbles the same way ever again. Seriously. I can't take bubble baths anymore. Tall women with Ayanami-looking bob cuts. This AWESOME restaurant.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 11, 2008 8:56 pm Nothing

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Jul 11, 2008 9:03 pm Converse All Stars

[]:             Quote Post by pata_333 » Fri Jul 11, 2008 9:17 pm BrikHaus wrote: Converse All Stars

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 11, 2008 9:25 pm pata_333 wrote: BrikHaus wrote: Converse All Stars

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Jul 11, 2008 9:34 pm Well that commercial for pillsbury toaster strudel, because its supposed to have layers of frosting, like the 90,000 layers of special armor on eva unit 02.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Fri Jul 11, 2008 10:02 pm Defectron wrote: Well that commercial for pillsbury toaster strudel, because its supposed to have layers of frosting, like the 90,000 layers of special armor on eva unit 02.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Fri Jul 11, 2008 10:57 pm You know what reminds of NGE? I take off my shoes every time I come in my house. Then again, my family's Asian, and the people in Eva are Asian.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Fri Jul 11, 2008 11:22 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Jul 12, 2008 7:47 am Nothing. Guess I am not as big of a geek as some of you guys/gals.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jul 12, 2008 11:25 am Nothing except for certain songs on the raido that might seem fitting lyrics-wise.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Jul 12, 2008 11:30 am CorporalChaos wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion__x » Sat Jul 12, 2008 8:47 pm The name 'Oscar' because it sounds exactly the same as 'Asuka' here in Australia, because whenever we pronounce a word with an er or ar on the end we pronounce it as 'ah'. And... that's about it. ^.^

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sat Jul 12, 2008 8:51 pm Pretty much any anime shop I come across.... Oh yeah, those gigantic Eva transporters, those big, delta shaped jets....I get reminded of them whenever I see the B-2 Stealth bomber. And yeah, any song that reminds me of songs from Evangelion. And flocks of birds.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Jul 13, 2008 2:58 am I put the song "Rei" from the sountrack as my ringtone.
